title: Ginger Ray Mr and Mrs Acrylic Wedding Chair Signs Decoration 2 Pack
features: Elevate the top table decorations with these gorgeous yet understated clear Acrylic Mr and Mrs Chair Signs.
Each pack contains 1 x Mr and 1 x Mrs wedding signs, measuring 30cm diameter each. Lengths of cotton rope are provided to attach for hanging.
Part of the Ginger Ray A Touch of Pampas Range
description: These beautiful contemporary Mr & Mrs Wedding Chair Signs are perfect for every wedding theme. These beautiful clear signs are finished with white scripted text and macrame style white cotton rope.These are the perfect signs to highlight the Bride and Grooms seats at the ceremony and for the Wedding Breakfast. Also use these timeless signs in your wedding photography and capture beautiful finishing touches of your most special day.Each pack contains 1 of each Mr and Mrs chair sign measuring 30cm diameter with cotton rope to attach to each. To ensure your product arrives in the best condition a protective film has been used. Please peel off the protective film before use.
